calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant David Andrew Roberts.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jennifer Myers, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Evelyn Sican, Loan Adjuster for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Sican appeared via CourtCall for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant David Andrew Roberts.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract/Common Counts was filed on August 20, 2019 and personally served on defendant David Andrew Roberts on December 2, 2019.
Default as to defendant David Andrew Roberts was entered on January 6, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant David Andrew Roberts, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,643.17. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $615.00.

Total - $27,059.07.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
